name: Sampo
desc: A merchant who freely travels between the Overworld and the Underworld.\nHe acts like he is everyone's friend, is enthusiastically humorous, and is good at bantering.

1.name: Rising Love
1.desc: When using Skill, deals DMG for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra time(s) to a random enemy.

2.name: Infectious Enthusiasm
2.desc: Defeating an enemy afflicted with Wind Shear has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict all enemies with <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of Wind Shear, equivalent to that of Skill.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

3.name: Big Money!
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: The Deeper the Love, the Stronger the Hate
4.desc: When Skill hits an enemy with <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more stack(s) of Wind Shear, the enemy immediately takes <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of current Wind Shear DMG.

5.name: Huuuuge Money!
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Increased Spending
6.desc: Talent's Wind Shear DMG multiplier increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

110801.name: Dazzling Blades
110801.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sampo's ATK to one designated enemy.
110801.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy.

110802.name: Ricochet Love
110802.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sampo's ATK to one designated enemy, and further deals DMG for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> extra time(s), with each time dealing Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sampo's ATK to a random enemy.
110802.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to single enemy targets with 5 Bounces in total.

110803.name: Surprise Present
110803.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sampo's ATK to all enemies, with a <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to increase the targets' DoT taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
110803.simple_desc: Deals Wind DMG to all enemies, with a high chance to cause <color=#f29e38ff>increased DoT taken</color> to them.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110804.name: Windtorn Dagger
110804.desc: Sampo's attacks have a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict Wind Shear for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nEnemies inflicted with Wind Shear will take Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Sampo's ATK at the beginning of each turn. Wind Shear can stack up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s).
110804.simple_desc: After hitting an enemy, there is a chance of inflicting <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear</color> on the target.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

110806.name: Attack
110806.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

110807.name: Shining Bright
110807.desc: After Sampo uses his Technique, enemies in a set area are afflicted with Blind for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). Blinded enemies cannot detect ally targets.\nWhen initiating combat against a Blinded enemy, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to <u>delay all enemies' action</u> by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
110807.simple_desc: Enemies in a set area are Blinded. When initiating battle against a Blinded enemy, there is a high chance to <u>delay</u> all enemies' actions.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

1.point_desc: Extends the duration of Wind Shear caused by Talent by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
Enemies with Wind Shear effect deal <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> less DMG to Sampo.
